metadata.purpose: Every Agent is represented as one employee with permanent Employee UUID and desk assignment. V1 files are preserved as compatibility records.
metadata.privacy: Logical workspaces only; no real local paths, tokens, IPs, secrets or private credentials.

departments.primary_outputs: WorkOrders, reports, reviews and handoff branches within department scope.
